name: Brand hub renders the brand backbone
description: Verify that the Brand object view renders the persistent brand context that campaigns and content generation depend on.

planSteps.description: Verify that the Brand view renders without a blank screen, browser error, or stuck loading state.
Verify that the page shows the Brand narrative section.
Verify that the page shows Brand voice and ICP sections.
Verify that the page shows Brand terminology.
Verify that reusable atoms are shown, or that a clear empty state explains that atoms will appear after approved posts.
